summary: Plan-only PR inventory assessment. No GitHub mutations are recommended. All five PRs are open non-security candidates, but none has complete merge preflight evidence, especially Codex /review proof and hydrated comment/review-bot resolution. Broad deltas, active-author status, or failing checks block the affected PRs individually.

actions.reason: Likely mergeable after full review preflight, but missing hydrated comments/review-bot state and Codex /review proof make a merge recommendation unsafe in this plan.
Failing checks block merge and the artifact does not include enough failure-log detail for a concrete repair artifact. Human or executor repair preflight is needed for this PR only.
Broad session-cost rewrite plus missing full review preflight falls under broad_code_delta and blocks merge recommendation.
The PR may be valuable, but it is broad and comment-heavy with incomplete review preflight. Human maintainer review is required before merge or repair planning.
Active-author status plus missing full merge preflight blocks merge recommendation even though the diff is small and checks are mostly passing.
